title: SelectableItem
description: A single option that can be presented to an LLM for selection within a ChoiceCard. Represents one possible action, tool, or capability.

id.description: Unique identifier for this item within its ChoiceCard.

label.description: Short human-readable label. Safe to include in an LLM prompt.

description.description: Concise description of what this item does. Must not include raw tool schema details.

capability_id.description: Optional reference to the Capability this item maps to. Used by agent-kernel to resolve the execution target.

metadata.description: Optional arbitrary key-value metadata for implementation-specific use.
